title: Asset Types
subtitle: Reusable templates that define how different kinds of assets are structured.

permissions.deniedView: You do not have permission to view asset types.
permissions.deniedCreate: You do not have permission to create asset types.
permissions.deniedEdit: You do not have permission to edit asset types.
permissions.deniedDelete: You do not have permission to delete asset types.

messages.deletedSuccess: The asset type was successfully deleted.

deleteDialog.title: Delete Asset Type?
deleteDialog.description: This action cannot be undone. Existing assets of this type may become orphaned.

emptyState.title: No asset types defined yet
emptyState.description: Create your first asset type to start defining asset templates.
